title: Add Jira Issue Key to new Jira integration
excerpt: Instead of the former Jira integration column, which gave a live link to the issue, issue keys can only be imported as text. Please bring back the live link.

posts.author: kelliem (Kellie M)
posts.cookedHtml: Instead of the former Jira integration column, which gave a live link to the issue, issue keys can only be imported as text. Please bring back the live link.

posts.author: Schteevynn (Stephen)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am testing our own Jira integration, and I’ve mapped Jira’s “Issue key” to a text column in Monday, and Jira’s “Link to issue” to a link column in Monday.

Now, if only I could dynamically generate the link text to truncate what displays in the column all the way down to the issue ID, either by chopping off everything to the left of the final “/” or by pulling in the Issue key value as the text. Hmmm.

Screenshot 2023-10-16 at 11.18.36 AM1392×226 6 KB

Screenshot 2023-10-16 at 11.11.52 AM564×698 27.7 KB

posts.author: EMorton (Erik Morton)
posts.cookedHtml: I do really miss this, because we’re using the same double column workaround, and it’s really not as fun/clean when it comes to building out an integration board.
